arts.ttl: Brentford boss Thomas Frank addresses Erik ten Hag pressure amid Manchester United links
arts.sum: Bees boss frequently touted as potential replacement at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba shares his thoughts on Sir Alex Ferguson's Manchester United 'axe' saying the club's greatest-ever manager is a 'legend' and will always be respected at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Paul Pogba has shared his take on Manchester United's cancellation of Sir Alex Ferguson's ambassador contract with the club.

arts.ttl: 'It's incredible' - Thomas Frank makes feelings clear on Erik ten Hag amid Man United criticism
arts.sum: Brentford boss Thomas Frank has had his say on the level of criticism that has been aimed at Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Manchester United agree deal with FC Lausanne as ex-Academy ace makes international debut
arts.sum: This week's Man Utd academy notebook on the latest ongoings, brought to you by the Manchester Evening News.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo flipped out after David Beckham teasing went too far at Man Utd
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand says he and his Manchester United team-mates used to take the mickey out of Cristiano Ronaldo so much that he used to "flip out" in front of everybody

arts.ttl: "Maybe something happens": Man United-linked Thomas Frank refuses to rule out Brentford exit
arts.sum: Thomas Frank insists that he is "very happy at Brentford", but he has refused to rule out a future exit amid reported interest from Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'I'm confident' - Thomas Frank gives Manchester United verdict ahead of Brentford fixture
arts.sum: Man United will welcome Brentford to Old Trafford in the Premier League this weekend in what has to be considered as a must-win game.

arts.ttl: Manchester United face up to alarming Harry Amass reality after honest admission
arts.sum: An ever-increasing number of Man United fans want to see Harry Amass given his first-team debut for the club.

arts.ttl: Denmark boss sends Rasmus Hojlund warning to Manchester United after injury fears
arts.sum: Man United striker Rasmus Hojlund stepped up his match sharpness by making two appearances for Denmark during the international break.
